arts.ttl: Wednesday’s briefing: City need win, Liverpool rest stars and Battle of Britain
arts.sum: The Champions League group stage concludes, with all 18 of the final matches kicking off at 8pm.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher makes major Arne Slot point after Liverpool transfer statement
arts.sum: Liverpool have romped into the next round of the Champions League and top the Premier League table in Arne Slot's debut season, but there is consternation among a section of the club's support about a lack of spending

arts.ttl: Liverpool on brink of Champions League history with feat never done before
arts.sum: Liverpool have won seven consecutive Champions League matches this season

arts.ttl: PSV vs Liverpool: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Liverpool finish their Champions League league phase campaign at PSV. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot set for challenge he knows all about as Liverpool get transfer hint
arts.sum: A closer look at Liverpool's Champions League opponents as Arne Slot returns to the Netherlands to face PSV Eindhoven

arts.ttl: PSV Eindhoven vs. Liverpool: Mohamed Salah among 12 players left out of Arne Slot's squad for Champions League clash
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is one of 12 senior Liverpool players who is left out of Arne Slot's 21-man Champions League squad for Wednesday's trip to PSV Eindhoven.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer latest: Former Premier League goalkeeper on Caoimhin Kelleher as Robert Sanchez replacement
arts.sum: A former Premier League goalkeeper tells Sports Mole that Chelsea could benefit from signing Caoimhin Kelleher if he can deal with pressure at the Blues.

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot aims dig at new Champions League format and insists he's '100 per cent sure it doesn't matter if you end up first or second' - after leaving 12 first-team stars at home for final group game
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE IN EINDHOVEN: Arne Slot says Liverpool 's result on Wednesday does not matter and finishing first in the new-look Champions League means nothing.

arts.ttl: Sources: Man United win race to sign 'complete' talent ahead of Liverpool and Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Arsenal made a last-ditch attempt to try and keep Manchester United-bound Ayden Heaven at N5. TBR Football revealed in...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot to rest nine senior Liverpool players in Champions League shuffle
arts.sum: Top seeding position already guaranteed after seven wins Opponents PSV have lost one of last 55 games at home Arne Slot has said finishing top of the group does not matter in the new Champions League format, which will generate at least €55.945m (£47m) in prize money for Liverpool this season. Slot has taken the opportunity Liverpool’s qualification for the last 16 has presented and omitted several regulars from the final group game at PSV Eindhoven. Virgil van Dijk, Mohamed Salah and Ryan Gravenberch, who have started all seven Champions League wins this season, are among those rested along with Alisson, Trent Alexander-Arnold, Ibrahima Konaté, Alexis Mac Allister, Dominik Szoboszlai and Luis Díaz. Trent Kone-Doherty, an 18-year-old forward, midfielders Isaac Mabaya and Kieran Morrison, and the defender Amara Nallo are among the 21-man travelling squad. Continue reading...
